agent_summary: Customer attempted a 1200 BDT payment (TXN-9301) which is marked failed, and reports balance deduction.
recommended_next_action: Investigate TXN-9301 ledger status. If balance was deducted on a failed or pending payment, follow the eligible reversal workflow within the standard SLA.
customer_reply: We have noted that transaction TXN-9301 may have caused an unexpected balance deduction. Our payments team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.
